name: sync mechanism triggers cross-loop emission when new patterns are discovered during sync
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop && printf 'sources: [{id: a, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --fetcher-stub new-patterns --cross-loop-log .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop/events.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q 'origin=pr-corpus' .claude-tdd-pro/cross-loop/events.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
